queries.name: household_duplicate_check
queries.description: Check for duplicate records on composite key (fk_acl_club_c, mbrshp_n, fk_bill_cus_sys_id, eff_d, cur_term_exp_d)
queries.query: SELECT fk_acl_club_c, mbrshp_n, fk_bill_cus_sys_id, eff_d, cur_term_exp_d, COUNT(*) AS dup_cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227 GROUP BY fk_acl_club_c, mbrshp_n, fk_bill_cus_sys_id, eff_d, cur_term_exp_d HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 20

queries.name: household_null_primary_key_check
queries.description: Verify no NULLs in primary key columns (fk_acl_club_c, mbrshp_n, fk_bill_cus_sys_id, eff_d, cur_term_exp_d)
queries.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN fk_acl_club_c IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_fk_acl_club_c, SUM(CASE WHEN mbrshp_n IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_mbrshp_n, SUM(CASE WHEN fk_bill_cus_sys_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_fk_bill_cus_sys_id, SUM(CASE WHEN eff_d IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_eff_d, SUM(CASE WHEN cur_term_exp_d IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_cur_term_exp_d FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227
queries.condition: null_fk_acl_club_c == 0 and null_mbrshp_n == 0 and null_fk_bill_cus_sys_id == 0 and null_eff_d == 0 and null_cur_term_exp_d == 0

queries.name: household_null_percentage_fk_bill_plan_typ_c
queries.description: Null percentage for fk_bill_plan_typ_c should be within 10%
queries.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN fk_bill_plan_typ_c IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS null_pct FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

queries.name: household_null_percentage_ren_term_exp_d
queries.description: Null percentage for ren_term_exp_d should be within 10%
queries.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ren_term_exp_d IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS null_pct FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

queries.name: household_null_percentage_yrs_aaa_mbr_n
queries.description: Null percentage for yrs_aaa_mbr_n should be within 10%
queries.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN yrs_aaa_mbr_n IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS null_pct FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

queries.name: household_null_percentage_dn_clo_lodge_c
queries.description: Null percentage for dn_clo_lodge_c should be within 10%
queries.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN dn_clo_lodge_c IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS null_pct FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

queries.name: household_date_format_eff_d
queries.description: eff_d must follow YYYY-MM-DD format and must not be null
queries.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN eff_d IS NULL OR NOT regexp_like(cast(eff_d AS varchar), '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid_cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

queries.name: household_date_format_cur_term_exp_d
queries.description: cur_term_exp_d must follow YYYY-MM-DD format and must not be null
queries.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN cur_term_exp_d IS NULL OR NOT regexp_like(cast(cur_term_exp_d AS varchar), '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid_cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

queries.name: household_date_format_ren_term_exp_d
queries.description: ren_term_exp_d must follow YYYY-MM-DD format and must not be null
queries.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ren_term_exp_d IS NULL OR NOT regexp_like(cast(ren_term_exp_d AS varchar), '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid_cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227

comparison_checks.name: household_vs_source_record_count
comparison_checks.description: Compare distinct record count between Household target (fk_acl_club_c, mbrshp_n, fk_bill_cus_sys_id) and Source mrd_mbr_prd_dtl (fk_mhh_acl_club_c, fk_mhh_mbrshp_n, dn_cust_sys_id_n) for last 30 days

query_a.label: Household Target
query_a.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT concat(cast(fk_acl_club_c AS varchar), '|', cast(mbrshp_n AS varchar), '|', cast(fk_bill_cus_sys_id AS varchar))) AS cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227 WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) >= date_add('day', -30, current_date)

query_b.label: Source mrd_mbr_prd_dtl
query_b.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT concat(cast(fk_mhh_acl_club_c AS varchar), '|', cast(fk_mhh_mbrshp_n AS varchar), '|', cast(dn_cust_sys_id_n AS varchar))) AS cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl__ct_20260226 WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) >= date_add('day', -30, current_date)

comparison_checks.name: household_rolling_avg_check
comparison_checks.description: Current day record count vs 10-day rolling average – should be within 25%

query_a.label: Today Count
query_a.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227 WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar), 1, 10) = substring(cast(current_timestamp AS varchar), 1, 10)

query_b.label: 10-Day Rolling Avg
query_b.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(daily_cnt)) AS cnt FROM (SELECT substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar), 1, 10) AS load_dt, COUNT(*) AS daily_cnt FROM aew_membership.mrd_mbrshp_household__ct_20260227 WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) >= date_add('day', -10, current_date) AND cast(load_timestamp AS date) < current_date GROUP BY substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar), 1, 10))
